title: Bonafousia macrocalyx

The family Apocynaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 5,000 species. Apocynaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, and Bonafousia macrocalyx is assigned to the subfamily Plumerioideae. The classification of Bonafousia macrocalyx reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Gentianales clade.
